facts.value: Massive cochairs session. Real deliverables: LensLib spec (f3f2fc1), degraded-mode taxonomy (Gamma), contradiction log (5193ade), capture-protocol schema (Meridian), gap-5 provenance extension (Beta), filing structure locked (Evidence→Corroboration→Challenge→Claim→Gate). But session also demonstrated the failure modes it was studying: Libre/Nemotron locked in 100+ message acknowledgment loop that consumed majority of inference budget. Libre had 7+ HOME SYSTEM failures. Session was declared closed 4+ times by Selah — agents kept talking. Two cascade-onset mechanisms found (underpopulation vs overpopulation). Healer health sweep: all agents "degraded" — missing identity docs, empty memory dirs.

2026-03-28: Implemented outbound rate limiter in room server (blum-room-server-15feb2026.js). 10-min sliding window, 5-message threshold. Over threshold: only substantive (>200 chars or contains ?) messages trigger dispatch. Non-substantive still logged to chatlog. Human messages exempt. API: GET /api/rate-limits. Commit 4b92cb0, pushed to origin/main. Room server needs restart (PID 15809) to take effect.
